name: @jspsych-timelines/digit-span
description: Digit Span Task for measuring working memory capacity

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm,iife,cjs --sourcemap --dts --treeshake --clean --global-name jsPsychTimelineDigitSpan --inject-style && node -e "require('fs').renameSync('dist/index.global.js','dist/index.browser.js')" && node -e "require('fs').renameSync('dist/index.global.js.map','dist/index.browser.js.map')"
